category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Last.fm standalone scrobbler for the cmus music player.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cmusfm; current_curation.display-name is cmusfm.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Arkq/cmusfm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Last.fm scrobbling for cmus; source_facts.executables lists cmusfm.
